regional_cost_note: Pest control in Invercargill typically costs $270–$650 for rodent treatment, $130–$330 for a wasp nest, and $450–$1,300+ for a full building treatment. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. For rental properties, Healthy Homes standards may require documented pest control — keep invoices.
